stemHtml: IFR in IMC, being radar vectored, radio fails. Considering minimum flight altitude, you should...

options.a: Rejoin the flight plan route by the most direct means, no later than the next significant point.
options.b: Maintain last heading for 10 minutes, then adjust per the flight plan.
options.c: Maintain last heading for 15 minutes, then adjust.
options.d: Climb to MSA and hold for 5 minutes, then rejoin the route.
